message:
🐛 Neutralize recommendation panel colors and persist collapse (#1990)

- Replace red/orange/yellow priority backgrounds with neutral card-gray
  on both CardRecommendations and MissionSuggestions chips and dropdowns
- Action buttons use primary theme color instead of priority-colored backgrounds
- Persist collapsed state to localStorage so panels stay minimized once
  the countdown expires or user manually collapses — they don't reappear
- Remove pulsing red dots from recommendation chips for cleaner look

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
